title: Revival Priest summons a cemetery creature and equips

card.rawText: Summon a creature from your cemetery to the field. If this card is removed from the field, send the creature back to the cemetery. If you have a creature on the field already, send it back to your hand.

plan.title: Revival Priest summons a cemetery creature and equips
plan.summary: Play Revival Priest with a creature in your cemetery, choose that creature, and verify the creature is summoned as primary with Revival Priest attached in a magic slot.

notes: Put a creature in player_1 cemetery before play.
Player_1 has no primary creature before Revival Priest resolves.

steps: Resolve the cemetery creature target prompt.
Inspect player_1 primary creature and magic slot.
manualVerification: Confirm the summoned creature is anchored to Revival Priest while the card remains equipped.
riskNotes: Source removal cleanup is covered by 115-E03.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate cemetery summon and equip link.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
